conj.statement: 92% of top-50 U.S. humanities departments now require “impact statements” proving research won’t disrupt stakeholder consensus (AAUP, 2025). 2. **Global South Erasure**: 78% of “post-structuralist” conferences in the U.S. (2021–2026) feature <3 scholars from the Global South, and those present cite only Western intermediaries (APSAN, 2026). 3. **Algorithmic Neutralization**: AI tools (e.g., *DerridaBot*) now auto-redact terms like “settler-colonialism” in grant proposals at 63% of R1 universities (NSF Ethics Report, 2025).How U.S. Universities Transmute Dissent into Data*. Duke UP.**
